economic_notes: Klahoose First Nation has investments in Qathen Xwegus Management Corporation, Klahoose Investment Limited Partnership, Klahoose Forestry No.2 Limited Partnership, and BC First Nations Gaming Fund. Revenue sharing from gaming noted. Significant capital asset acquisitions of $6.3M in fiscal 2020.
notes: Consolidated entity includes 6 fully consolidated funds and 3 government business enterprises on modified equity basis (Qathen Xwegus Management Corporation, Klahoose Investment Limited Partnership, Klahoose Forestry No.2 Limited Partnership). Investment in Treaty (Investment in Treaty) of $3,593,459 in prior year was written down to zero in 2020 (decrease of $3,593,459 noted in cash flow). Share of loss of First Nation Controlled Entities is a large negative revenue item ($1,624,521 in 2020 vs $6,279,489 in 2019). Total government transfers calculated as ISC + CMHC + FNHA + Province of BC + Treaty negotiation support agreement. Long-term debt decreased significantly from $4,344,664 to $598,929 due to principal repayments of $3,745,734.
